ItacWorkItem.Notes: In the preface to the second volume, the author mentions the investiganti Academy
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Consensus. Opus inscriptum Ioannis Caramuelis Theologia Moralis, & c. typis mandari, & in lucem edi à Ioanne Baptista Devenet Bibliopola Lugdunensi, Ego Regis Consiliarius & Advocatus in Lugdunebsi Praefectura, non impedio. Lugduni, die 17. Februarij 1655. Bollioud Mermet. Permissio. Visso Procuratoris Regis consensu, Librum hunc typis mandari à Ioanne Baptista Devenet concedimus; & ne quis ultra concessam facultatem denuò excudat prohibemus. Datum Lugduni, die 17. Februarij 1655. De Seve.

Dedicatees.ItacPersonItem: Nuñez De Guzman,Petro,Count of Villombrosa and Castronuovo,

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
